seoTitle: Wickham vs Wilmot — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wickham and Wilmot. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wickham and Wilmot.
heading: Wickham vs Wilmot — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wickham, Tasmania and Wilmot, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilmot has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Wickham (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wickham or Wilmot safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wickham has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Wilmot scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wickham scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Wilmot scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wickham or Wilmot?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilmot has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
